title: How One Scripture a Day Rewires a Man's Thinking
caption:
One verse. Every morning. Before your phone.

Not a chapter. Not a reading plan you'll abandon in two weeks. One verse, read slowly, with one question: what does this mean for today?

Do that for 30 days and compare how your mind handles pressure with how it handled it before. The anxiety, the impulse, the slow drift — the Word interrupts all of it. Not instantly. Faithfully, over time.

"Be transformed by the renewing of your mind." — Romans 12:2

This is how that works.

Save this for the week your quiet time has gone cold.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #bible #godlymen #manofgod #thework #romans12 #discipline #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
